_comment_2: Tyk Classic API definition for p05-rl-endpoint. The canonical contract is:
_comment_5: Tyk implements per-endpoint rate limits via extended_paths.rate_limit (Classic API). Each entry binds a rate to a (path, method) pair. We only declare ONE entry on (GET, /anything/limited) so /anything/free is implicitly unrestricted — Tyk evaluates extended_paths only for paths that match.
_comment_6: use_extended_paths must be true for Tyk to consult extended_paths at all (default false in OSS).
_comment_7: No global_rate_limit here — that would 429 /free during the 1200-req burst and break the scoping invariant.
_comment_8: use_keyless: true keeps auth out of the equation; this profile measures only the rate-limit primitive's scoping behavior.
name: bench
